entry.title: New MDG implementation for supplier module - Restriction based on BU group or alternate solutions
entry.content:
We have a new MDG implementation for supplier module and would like to restrict different groups of users with "Account Group" (In search) and also in "Manage Supplier" -> Select ‘New’ > "Organization" > "X– Create Supplier" to specific "Business Partner id/group".


Looking at the B_BUPA_GRP authorization object, it doesn't check for these BP BU groups. We did set some groups in "Maintain Authorization Groups " but are there any other steps to configure so the authorization checks are performed for B_BUPA_GRP.


If we would like to go with restriction for display/change/create based on "BU Groups", is it only done by custom development?
Is there any other suggestion to go with data visibility restriction of BP’s? And also to create change requests for specific groups?

entry.title: Re: What are the best approach to store/replicate histori...
entry.content:
Apologies, this question didn't show up in our 'SAP Landscape Transformation replication server' community because the tag was missing.

This might be a better question for other users/consultants.  If you still have questions on this, can you please clarify what you mean by 'store/replicate historical data'?

entry.title: Strategy in capacity scheduling table
entry.content:
Which dispatch sequence is used to dispatch orders in capacity scheduling table.

What will happen in planning mode Sequence and Bucket.

What is the difference between find slot, insert operation scheduling control in set strategy.

entry.title: Re: How can i upgrade SAP Gui 8.0 from 7.5 with command l...
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you using SAP GUI 800 32bit or 64bit? You can verify that each has a different name for the command line in SAP Setup.

To make an upgrade you need first to uninstall the previous product version via command line:

NwSapSetup.exe /Silent /Uninstall /Product="<product_name>"

Then to install the new product:

C:\Users\<user>\Installation Server\Setup\NwSapSetup.exe /Silent /Product="<product_name>"

<user> and <product_name> are placeholders which content may vary depending on the user executing the command and the target product.

Also /silent parameter is optional but it causes the process to be executed silently on background, it can be replaced by /nodlg (no dialog but with visible progress bar) or you can completely remove this parameter if wanted.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: ECC to Target CFIN S4 : Error- Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled
entry.content:
Dear Members,

I am trying to validate document replication from Source ECC to Target CFIN.

With respect to this validation, I have posted SD and MM documents in ECC replicate to CFIN S4.
Document creation flow as followed:
creation of sales order - VA01 > 
creation of delivery & post goods issue -VL01N >
billing invoice creation -VF01 OR VF04 > 
creation of purchase requisition - ME51N > 
creation of purchase order-ME21N > creation of goods receipt - MIGO > creation of supplier invoice - MIRO

The RV document under VF01 need to replicate to S4 with success posting's in target BKPF table , However I am facing Error: (Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled).

As per S4 Document splitting settings PRCTR is mandatory and in ECC RV type document VF01 we are not maintained profit center. How to work around with successful posting in S4 CFIN ?
What are the steps and pre requisites I need to follow or which I am missing please suggest.

For example : A material transfer document from one plant to another plant. MIGO_GR Doc type WE posted in ECC was not successful in CFIN S4 displaying same error.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: OVR/INS
entry.content: Insert or Overwrite. It relates to what functionality you want in a field.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am Gorkem and I can identify myself in following categories,

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts.
First generation college students.
People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

When I finished my University about One year ago, I started my SAP journey. I discover SAP learning and get a foundational course then I have got a job thanks to you. and still I am currently working as a consultant. I was also a first generation college attendee in my family. I am living in the rural area in Turkey and my purchasing power is diminishing due to high inflationary environment. I am newly graduated 1 year ago from university and I have not got enough savings for the certification exam. 

I would appreciate that If I receive a certification exam attempt. I have been studying for the exam about a month and already finished 2 learning journey. I am grateful for this opportunity.

Thank you SAP!!

entry.title: Re: Showing last one month data in HANA
entry.content: This one works for the last months data --- SELECT YEAR(ORG_TIMECREATED), MONTH(ORG_TIMECREATED), ORG_NAME, ORG_TIMECREATED FROM Organization WHERE YEAR(ORG_TIMECREATED) = YEAR(add_months(now(), -1)) AND MONTH(ORG_TIMECREATED) = MONTH(add_months(now(), -1))

entry.title: Re: How to Query The Date Filed in OData?
entry.content: Thank you Umakant ...

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content: @StephanieMarley I am FI-AA consultant and I would llike to improve myself in CO and some other modules that are related with FI such as CM, CR. I have joined the TechEd community. Thank you for letting me know. I am excited for the virtual event.

entry.title: Manage work center capacity app
entry.content:
Intro
In GUI we will have explanation for every fields and columns in reports or transactions. But in Fiori we don't have such option and this makes it difficult to understand about the values in the fields and their functionalities. For people who are moving from GUI to Fiori it will be easy to understand. But for people who start from FIORI, it will be difficult.

If you face the same then please raise a request to SAP. People from SAP please look in to it.

Main Part:

In my case when I have seen the Manage work center Capacity app, I could able to see multiple column in the output screen. But no explanations were there.

Later compared this screen with old sap CM02 screen to found the explanation for the values.

Utilization:

Here you can see the evaluation period from Fiori and GUI is 1 month and have 5 weeks. So the utilization column will have 5 bars = 5 weeks. Also the bucket type defines this.

Cumulative load = Requirements / available capacity * 100 = 24/184 *100 = 13%

It will consider the requirement and capacity with in the evaluation period i.e. 1 month this value is calculated. 

Total capacity requirement = the total work hours occupied on that week by planned or production orders.

Max load = the maximum capacity load on the evaluation period. Here its 75% as in CM02

Average load = Requirement / Remaining available capacity * 100 = 24/160 * 100 = 15 %

Minimum Load = the least load with in the evaluation period. Here its 0% as in CM02

Conclusion:

I hope this may help you on understanding the app more. Please post you comments if there are changes. Please go through for more details link

entry.title: Re: anybody tried the learning hub IDES yet?
entry.content: can't believe nobody bought it in the last 4 months or so, esp since there's no open.sap.com any more.

entry.title: Re: What can't SAP Web GUI do? / Was kann SAP Web GUI nicht?
entry.content:
Hello,

You can check 314568 - SAP GUI for HTML functionality / Limitations / Sp. Behaviour

For a full list of limitations in WEBGUI per Kernel level.

Most notably the WEBGUI is known for its limitations regarding Office Integration.

Hopefully this will help you with your request.

entry.title: Career Paths - Succession and Development
entry.content:
Hello!

We are in the process of setting up Career Paths and I would love to know your methodology of how you setup yours. Did you have linear career paths (ex. Field Engineer to Sr Field Engineer to Engineer Manager to Sr Engineer Manager, etc) or did you have more nuanced career paths (field engineer can go in a linear path or could go to cost control, environmental, quality etc). And if possible, would you be able to send a screenshot of an example in SuccessFactors?

We are a very small team, and this could become a very large project so we are trying to get a sense of what other companies have done before we start.

Thank you for your help!

Steph

SAP SuccessFactors Succession & Development

entry.title: Re: Ariba GB: Unable to receive ASN qty
entry.content:
Hello,

Please refer to the note

3282518 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Restrictions for Guided Buying Capability with SAP Ariba Buying (2NV)

  • If receiving is enabled in guided buying, we recommend that you receive an entire order in either guided buying or in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

entry.title: SAP FICO Handling of Expenses Before Sales
entry.content:
Not sure if this is the correct place to post this question - but looking for help with regards to how SAP handles expenses that post to the GL before the sale.  

In our current system - depending if the expense is on a purchase or a sale - the entire (or portion) of the expense will post to a COGS GL account.   However - this isn't great accounting - since we don't have an accurate picture of our actual COGS caused by sales. 

Is there functionality in SAP that would allow expenses to go to a Prepaid Expense account (if there wasn't a sale yet when the expense posted) and then when the sale is made - to move the expense from Prepaid Expenses to the COGS accounts.

entry.title: AFO Connection Removed from File but still linked
entry.content:
Hi, 

I inherited a file that previously was using AFO. The link to AFO was removed prior to me inherited the file but there seems to be a hidden link to the connection still in the file. This is a file used by several members of the team therefore I want to enable autosave but due to the hidden connection, the file cannot autosave. 

#AFO 

Thank you!

entry.title: Fiscal Period input parameter in custom analytical query default to current period
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to build a custom analytical query using FMBDP and FMIFIIT tables. Both has the data maintained based on Fiscal period wise and there is a requirement to display the Budget and FI value for the current month / current period other than sum of from Period 001 to Period 016.

The custom analytical query will have an input of Fiscal period /Current Period with the current period value as default. 

For ex: If the user runs the report for this month, then the Fiscal/Current period input has 009 as default. 

How this can be achieved in the custom analytical query? 

if we cannot make it in the Custom analytical query and it can be achieved by CDS view as a column/field using the system date or date function then please advise how it can be determined or write the logic for the same.

Thanks.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content:
Currently there is no native Personas capability to disable the keyboard.

A feature is planned for SP19 which aims to address this and will introduce a property to control the mobile device keyboard, allowing the flavor to hide it for individual fields. Note that this is not a promise that it will be indeed part of the next SP, but it is in the current plan.

Years ago, there was a solution posted here which is a little more involved than having a specific property, if you have no time to wait for the new feature to be released.

After trying to connect again, it shows a login error and when trying to configure the entire connection again, it shows a Java error.

entry.title: Re: change to Chart of Accounts Template
entry.content:
Hi,

The "Chart of Accounts Template" option cannot be changed anymore after initial G/L postings have been created within the applicable SAP Business One database.

However, you may create new or update existing G/L accounts.

Best of luck.

entry.title: Re: Unable side menu on Zebra - RF - Personas
entry.content:
Yes, if you are OK with disabling the right-click context menu (since that is what appears). To do this, you need to run the following script command:

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/mnu").hide();
You could add this as part of the onLoad script for the screen.

entry.title: Re: Customer Aging and Supplier Aging Reports at the Line Item Level using Analytical Query in S/4HA
entry.content: Great, thanks! Is there a way to add the posting dates after I add each Journal Entry reference as is presented in the Supplier Line Items FIORI app?

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Companion Extended Scenario in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Kavinprabu,

It is technically possible to display Standard Content and your customer-specific content through SAP Companion but customer-specific content can only be displayed if the user is not authenticated.  It doesn't matter whether the user authenticates via SSO or via manual login, the user must still be authenticated to access customer-specific content.  The only options that you have are:

1. Setup SSO so that only a limited number of users are authenticated, i.e. the authentication fails some users.  If the authentication fails for some users, you can use the disableManualLogin=true parameter to close the authentication window.  In this instance, the user should still be able to see the standard content
2. Configure SAP Companion to only show standard content, this does not require Enable Now licenses

There is no way to allow users to access customer-specific content through SAP Companion without the user being authenticated.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David_Chaviano ,

I am excited to express my interest in joining the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. As a woman currently working as a Bank Associate and pursuing a Master’s in Financial Data Analytics, I am eager to enhance my understanding of the financial data analytics capabilities offered by the SAP S4/HANA platform.

The potential to leverage SAP in transforming financial systems excites me, and I am determined to dive deeply into learning these tools to further my expertise. I am confident this initiative will be a great step toward achieving my goals.

Thank you for this opportunity, and I look forward to being part of this journey.

Best regards,

Mahsa

entry.title: Empowerment of Women Through Education and Livelihood Skill-Building
entry.content:
Women’s empowerment is a humanitarian choice, and it’s a relatively easy one to make when we prioritize education and genuinely enriching entrepreneurial opportunities. Women’s empowerment doesn’t just improve the lives of the women concerned, however – it is a lucrative way to boost the entire global economy and to help people around the world achieve climate justice for all.

Barefoot College International(BCI) has always recognized the significance of spearheading women-centric and women-run vocational programs. At the grassroots level, women, historically underrepresented and undervalued, are an untapped resource that benefits entire communities when cultivated.

For example, a highly acclaimed McKinsey studyreports that including more women in the workforce could boost global GDP by US$12 trillion by 2025. Narrowing gender disparity has substantial benefits aside from the purely economic, such as providing an increase in planned parenthood, improved sexual health for women and girls, and overall greater awareness and adaptability to the regional effects of climate change.

Statistically, more than 90% of rural women who are offered entrepreneurial and educational resources end up staying in their local villages. Women are more predisposed to return to their communities instead of leaving to monetize their skills elsewhere after training, and they are more likely, too, to share the knowledge they acquire with their friends and family, especially their children – regardless of the child’s gender.

Educational opportunities provide women with not only a chance to acquire skills they would otherwise never have had the chance to learn, but it also vastly improves opportunities for those around them. It also encourages a culture of transferring knowledge and information by witnessing the benefits of education as an income-generating factor that benefits men as well.

Barefoot College International has tailored their initiatives to the leadership potential of women through regionally specific livelihoods and entrepreneurial opportunities. These include programs such as solar engineering, sewing and drone pilot programs, and agricultural livelihood programs, including organic coffee farming and beekeeping. Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging (DEI&B) are at the forefront of the BCI curriculum, including digital literacy, women’s rights, and women’s sexual health programs.

With these comprehensive and holistic educational experiences, BCI’s mission to spearhead economic mobility and autonomy for marginalized communities can be achieved fast and effectively, and most importantly with equity.

To donate to this great organization, visit their website.

Check out the recent research from the SAP SuccessFactors HR research team:

Whitepaper: Four approaches to making skills a reality in your organization

Infographics:

  • Assessing the skills-based hiring timeline
  • Changing mindsets about skills-based hiring
  • Winning the race for skills with skills-based pay

Videos:

  • 4 approaches to making skills a reality in your organization
  • 6 questions you should be asking as you pursue your skills journey
  • Skills-based practices: spotlights on hiring and pay

Blogs:

  • Making Skills a Reality in Your Organization
  • Norsk Hydro Empowers Talent with AI Capabilities on Journey to Become a Skills-Based Organization

So, how can I have a dynamic text with input control on analytics application designer? A little context on the problem, I want to add the text on a popup window. I already sorted out the popup window.

Thanks for your Help !

#SAC #AnalyticsApp

entry.title: Enhancing Business Efficiency with SAP Build: Work Zone, Apps, and Process Automation
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) provides a robust suite of tools to help organizations build, extend, and enhance their digital capabilities. Among these tools are SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Build Apps, and SAP Build Process Automation. Each tool serves a unique purpose, from creating digital workplaces to developing custom applications and automating processes. This blog introduces these tools, outlines their key features, and provides examples to help you determine when to use each.

Intended Audience

This blog is intended for SAP developers, IT professionals, business process owners, and decision-makers looking to optimize digital experiences, streamline workflows, and accelerate digital transformation. Whether you are a developer seeking low-code solutions, an IT manager focusing on automation, or a business leader aiming to enhance employee productivity, this blog will help you understand how SAP Build tools can drive value for your organization.

Understanding the SAP Build Umbrella

SAP Build is a unified suite within SAP BTP that encompasses SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Build Apps, and SAP Build Process Automation. Together, these tools empower both business users and developers to design intuitive user interfaces, create custom applications, and automate complex workflows, all without the need for extensive coding skills.

  • SAP Build Work Zone focuses on creating a personalized digital workspace, where employees can access all their tools and information in one place.
  • SAP Build Apps is a low-code/no-code platform that enables rapid development of custom applications.
  • SAP Build Process Automation allows users to automate repetitive tasks and streamline business processes efficiently.

SAP Build Work Zone

SAP Build Work Zone enables organizations to create a unified digital workspace that enhances employee experience by integrating multiple applications, data sources, and services into a single, customizable portal. It is ideal for companies aiming to improve employee productivity and engagement by providing a personalized and consolidated workspace.

  • Key Features:
  • Unified access to SAP and third-party apps
  • Customizable user interfaces with drag-and-drop functionality
  • Pre-built templates for quick deployment
  • Role-based content delivery

Example Use Case: Create a central portal for HR that consolidates employee self-service tools, payroll information, training resources, and internal communication platforms.

SAP Build Apps

SAP Build Apps is a low-code/no-code platform that allows users to rapidly develop and deploy custom applications. Designed for both business users and developers, it offers a visual development environment to build responsive applications that can connect to SAP and non-SAP data sources.

  • Key Features:
  • Low-code/no-code application development
  • Drag-and-drop interface for rapid prototyping
  • Pre-built connectors for easy integration with various data sources
  • Flexibility to customize app logic and design

Example Use Case: Develop a mobile application for field service agents to access real-time inventory data, log service requests, and update task statuses without needing extensive coding knowledge.

SAP Build Process Automation

SAP Build Process Automation allows organizations to automate repetitive, manual tasks and streamline business processes using SAP’s AI and machine learning capabilities. This tool is perfect for companies looking to reduce errors, improve efficiency, and lower operational costs.

  • Key Features:
  • Visual workflow design and automation
  • Integration with SAP and third-party systems
  • Pre-built bot templates and AI services
  • Monitoring and analytics for process optimization

Example Use Case: Automate the end-to-end invoice processing workflow, from data extraction to approval, reducing manual intervention and accelerating processing times.

Comparison of SAP Build Tools

 

Conclusion and Next Steps

SAP BTP offers a powerful set of tools — SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Build Apps, and SAP Build Process Automation — to help organizations enhance employee experiences, rapidly develop applications, and automate processes. Start by identifying key areas where these tools can provide the most value, and consider initiating a small pilot project to explore their potential benefits. In the next blog, we’ll discuss advanced integration techniques and best practices for maximizing your SAP BTP investments.

entry.title: Maximizing ROI: 4 benefits of a business data fabric with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
In our data-driven world, it may seem inevitable that some information will remain scattered across disparate systems. Even after significant progress in organizing your data, you may still wonder if there’s a more effective way to manage all your data and whether a smoother approach to data integration could give you a leg up on the competition.

Rest assured, the answer is a definitive yes.

Imagine having self-service access to reliable data with business context intact. This is precisely what a business data fabric provides. But there are multiple paths to implementing a business data fabric, and some are more cost-effective than others.

4 ways organizations achieve remarkable savings with a business data fabric

In my previous blog, I talked about the advantages of choosing SAP Datasphere as the foundation for a business data fabric over a DIY blend of applications. Here, I’ll take a look at the ROI you can expect from implementing a business data fabric with SAP Datasphere based on the GigaOm TCO analysis, and how it depends in large part on your implementation approach.

1. Streamlining data integration

Integrating all data sources, including applications, clouds, and on-premise servers, provides a more cohesive view of your data and streamlines your analytics. This results in easier and faster access to impactful business insights. According to the GigaOm TCO analysis, the cost of using SAP Datasphere to achieve this was 69% lower than the cost of developing and establishing a DIY data fabric.

2. Achieving cost advantages

GigaOm found that companies saved up to 138% in total cost of ownership over three years when they use SAP Datasphere compared to DIY implementations. These are savings you can reinvest in other critical areas.

3. Increasing operational efficiency

In addition to saving money, you can cut your initial data fabric build timelines by more than half. GigaOm found that SAP Datasphere reduces the initial build timeline by about 2.5 times compared to DIY implementations, getting you up and running much faster and with less effort. And you won’t need to dedicate as much headcount to the build/migrate, CI/CD, and administration stages of implementation with SAP Datasphere, enabling you to achieve more with less.

4. Enabling scalability for future growth

Every business data fabric has its benefits, but it’s only as useful as it is scalable. The ideal solution allows your business and data solutions to grow at the same pace. SAP Datasphere is designed to support scalable growth. GigaOm found that the three-year TCO for a large data fabric implementation is $8.55 million with SAP Datasphere compared to $20.76 million with a DIY blend of applications. These savings provide long-term value and enables you to prepare your business for future challenges and opportunities.

Get started

SAP Datasphere is the foundation for a comprehensive, integrated business data fabric that streamlines the entire data management process. Visit the business data fabric page to learn more.

entry.title: SAP ECC 6 EHP 7 FInance Closing period Restriction setup and configuration

and Everyone

                         AZN                                          AZN

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: ICMR workflow Adjustment and Closing & communication...
entry.content:
Hi @Annafri,

Usually, the inbox should receive the notification/approval task immediately when email was sent. If it's not the case, you can create a ticket to component BC-BMT-WFM, this is not an ICMR issue.

Regarding the issue "check not performed" in Manage Teams and Responsibilities app, it can't be reproduced on my end either. If it prevents you from enabling the workflow/team assignment, you can raise the issue to component CA-GTF-RM.

Thanks!

Grace

entry.title: Issue with Range Partition (/B**/FKO**)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have recently received an alert for the table SAPB***./B**/FKO** , specifically Partition 4, in our BPC Production system (***). Upon investigation, we found that the Range partition was executed on the key "KEY_KOII***" with the following ranges: 0, 1, 2, and others (*). However, only data for range 0 is present while ranges 1 and 2 are missing.

Table Name: /B**/FKO**

It seems that the data has been recorded under partition ID 4 (i.e., *). Looks like the partitioning was not performed correctly (in DIGITS), and the ranges were not properly assigned during the process.

Could you please provide a solution to resolve this partitioning issue? Is there an alternative solution that can be performed online without requiring an outage? Please let us know if you need any additional information. I've attached screenshots of the table for reference.

Thanks,
***


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Range Partition (/B**/FKO**)
entry.content:
The issue you are encounterring that is a typical problem, what you need to do for handling this situation is following this note:

- note
2019973 - Handling Very Large Data Volumes in SAP BW on SAP HANA
2374652 - Handling Very Large Data Volumes in SAP BW/4HANA
-> Handling Large Data Volumes - 2 Billion Limit Value Reached

You need apply script TABLE_PLACEMENT.zip and perform reorg after that.

entry.title: Re: Chinese Localisation- The period close account selection criteria does not include the revenue a
entry.content: Hi All, Is there any update or solution to this?

entry.title: BW on HANA Migration to BW4 PCE with mixed modeling
entry.content:
HI All,

We have one question for BW4 PCE migration. We use external HANA view and BW modeling in BW on HANA currently. As what we known it is mixed hana  modeling.

Is it possible mirgrate to BW PCE migration, and keeping the mixed modeling way in the future.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Customer Business Partner Change Log History Query
entry.content: Happy to know new Audit Trial Change Log History report is delivered in new patch 2408.

entry.content:
Does Vmware Vsphere 7.0 release support SAP HANA 1.0 SPS 12 Revision 122.06 release?
At the same time, whether AWS can support this version of SAP HANA？

entry.title: Re: Screen Personas : Change Cell Value In Table
entry.content:
I don't know what transaction your screen is from, but I tried changing the 'Customer Material Number' cell value in the first row of the item overview table in VA02's 'Sales' tab and this worked fine for me:

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4400/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4900/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_AUFTRAG").modifyCell(0, 'VBAP-KDMAT', 'test');

The value was changed to test as expected. Of course, the table and field must be editable for this to work.

entry.title: RE: How to regulate CALM collected data
entry.content:
We are currently working with the CALM integrations for health monitoring and CTMS, as CALM is providing 8GB of data we would like to regulate the CALM collected data. And we would like to optimize our data management practices, we need guidance on how to regulate and manage the CALM collected data effectively.

Could you please provide us with detailed information on the following:

What procedures or tools does SAP provide for archiving old data or deleting data that is no longer needed? Can you provide guidelines for implementing these processes effectively?

How can we segment or filter CALM data to focus on specific metrics or operational areas? Are there any built-in features or recommended methods for customizing data views?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: RE: How to regulate CALM collected data
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

As documented in the guide Fire-Use, you can monitor the SAP HANA memory consumption in SAP Cloud ALM in the Health Monitoring app by selecting your SAP Cloud ALM service and checking the SAP Cloud ALM HANA Memory metric.
You can see the details of the memory usage for different function areas.

To reduce your memory usage, you can change your housekeeping settings in SAP Cloud ALM for operations apps. For more information, see Housekeeping on SAP Support Portal.

To cover extended use scenarios, you can subscribe to additional services.

Best regards,
Peng

entry.title: Re: How to install more than one DP Agent on a machine (W...
entry.content: I assume you use the different directory for installation , for the port configuration, it is in dpagentconfig.ini file under dpagent installation folder.

entry.title: Re: How to install more than one DP Agent on a machine (W...
entry.content: framework.adminport= framework.listenerPort

entry.title: Re: 3ª Feira Laboral SAP Future Talent | Brazil
entry.content: Muito bom! Fiz minha inscrição.

entry.title: Re: Date format validation in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Balu,

 

could you please let us know what exactly you are trying to achieve?

Are you trying to bring in data to datasphere via a replication flow? where do you want to validate the date?

entry.title: Call RAP methods from Control.js
entry.content:
Hello ,

I have an application developed using restful abap where I have few address fields on the object page.

My requirement is to have custom action and by selecting, it should validate the address and give the user a popup with suggested or corrected address. 

Since its not possible to have a popup with RAP itself, I created this custom action button using the guided development in SAP BAS. That created function call which is located in controller.js.

Question is: is there a way I can call my RAP method from controller.js to validate the address when user clicks on the button? 

Appreciate your response

entry.title: Re: change to Chart of Accounts Template
entry.content:
Hi,

Chart of Account template is an initialization step for working. If the same is selected and entries have been posted, then change to the same is not possible. Even if the transactions posted are reversed, it will not matter. The change is not possible.

You can check, Financial Report Templates to see if you can create your own customized template for B/S, P&L or Trial Balance. Not sure if that is helpful.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to create RAP Action to generate a file to download?
entry.content: Same Requirement

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I tried to run the abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022 via Docker in my Windows 10 local machine but I got an error message FAIL: process hdbindexserver HDB Indexserver-HDB not running

Basic info and background:

I am able to run the ABAPTRIAL 2022 in my Linux machine (Fedora).

My host machine has 64 GB of RAM and there are 237 GB of disk space available in drive: C.

My docker desktop is running with WSL 2 based engine.

I already have the ABAP 1909 trial docker image and the 1909 container works fine (as shown below).

I am quite sure that the resources of my machine have passed the minimum requirements to run the container.

The command I executed was

 

docker run --stop-timeout 3600 -it -p 3200:3200 -p 3300:3300 -p 3601:3601 -p 8443:8443 -p 30213:30213 -p 50000:50000 -p 50001:50001 --name a4h2022 -h vhcala4hci sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022 -skip-limits-check -agree-to-sap-license

 

note: I named it as a4h2022 because a4h is already occupied by the 1909. I also though if this is the root cause of this error but it seems it wasn't not because I already tried to rename the 1909 container to another name and run the 2022 with --name a4h but I still got the same result.

This is some system information inside the container.

Has anyone encountered this kind of problem? Any suggestion like which log file that I should have a look into.

I already tried to google it but still could not find the solution. Any suggestion you can provide would be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Wises K.

entry.title: Re: SAP C4C free trial tennant for study

entry.title: Re: EPM 刷新出现错误
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please follow the solution in KBA 2878435 - Error : "SY_530", "UJ0_EXCEPTION_005" and see if the issue can be resolved.

For your future reference, for EPM Add-in issues, please choose the SAP managed tag SAP Business Planning and Consolidation, version for SAP NetWeaver and EPM Add-In for Excel so your question can be directed to the right experts.

Best regards,
Amy

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning customize email text
entry.content: I have created an idea for this requirement - please vote https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/330713/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: Реферальный код B Y B I T : BET666 (получите $30 000 USDT)
entry.content:
Реферальный код B Y B I T : BET666 (регистрация B Y B I T)

Ищете последний реферальный код B Y B I T на 2024 год? Мы вам поможем! Используйте реферальный код B Y B I T "BET666", чтобы разблокировать эксклюзивные преимущества на бирже B Y B I T: бонус до $30 000 USDT и 10% скидки на торговые комиссии в течение первого месяца. Кроме того, зарегистрировавшись с реферальным кодом "BET666", вы получите рекламное вознаграждение в размере $25 USDT от биржи.

Что такое реферальный код B Y B I T?

Код "BET666" — это реферальный код B Y B I T для новых пользователей. Реферальный код B Y B I T приглашает пользователей присоединиться к платформе B Y B I T для онлайн-торговли криптовалютой, предлагая пользователям бесплатные бонусы за регистрацию. Просто введите реферальный код "BET666" во время регистрации, чтобы получить приветственный бонус до $30 000 USDT и 10% скидки на торговые комиссии.

Как использовать реферальный код регистрации B Y B I T

Шаг 1: зарегистрируйтесь с помощью реферального кода
Начните с посещения веб-сайта B Y B I T или загрузки мобильного приложения. Нажмите «Зарегистрироваться» и используйте эту [реферальную ссылку B Y B I T]. Введите свой адрес электронной почты, пароль и реферальный код «BET666». Вы также можете зарегистрироваться, используя свой номер мобильного телефона. Согласитесь с условиями и политикой конфиденциальности, затем нажмите «Зарегистрироваться». Подтвердите свою учетную запись, введя код, отправленный на ваш адрес электронной почты или номер мобильного телефона.

Шаг 2: внесите свой первый криптовалютный депозит
Перейдите в раздел «Активы» вверху, выберите криптовалюту, которую вы хотите внести, и нажмите «Депозит». Вы увидите QR-код и адрес для перевода средств из вашего кошелька.

Шаг 3: получите свои бонусы через «Rewards Hub»
После внесения депозита перейдите в «Rewards Hub» вверху страницы. Вы найдете различные задания, чтобы получить награды, такие как внесение первого депозита, использование ордеров тейк-профит/стоп-лосс и торговля контрактами USDT. Эти задания предоставляют бонусы и купоны, которые помогают снизить торговые сборы и покрыть потенциальные убытки. Нажмите «Запросить» для каждого выполненного задания, чтобы воспользоваться своими наградами.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content:
@ulrich_mhrke

This is screen flow logic:

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  MODULE status_0400.

PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  MODULE user_command_0400.


PROCESS ON VALUE-REQUEST.

And for Module user_command_400.

 CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'NEWMAT'.
      "test run
      SET PARAMETER ID 'OPTION' FIELD 'MAT'.
      CALL TRANSACTION 'ZTRANS'.

 NEWMAT is function key declared for the button on screen 400.

entry.title: Re: Ledger 0L data are there any duplicates for the example 3 in the note 2554992 ?
entry.content: Or, does the depreciation area 15 not post to general ledger？It should be set as '0-Area Does Not Post' with the G/L indicator in the table view V_T093_00N.

entry.title: Re: How to create RAP Action to generate a file to download?
entry.content: Utilizing BTP/BAS, create a UI5 enhancement project for the RAP application and enhance a Custom SAP UI5 application with XSLX library by SheetJS to download as Excel File for a custom view table.

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements list report: Aggregate functions are not allowed in transactional views?
entry.content: Check Support.sap.com for relevant notes such as 2489473 - ABAP CDS: Aggregate functions in View Extends

entry.title: Re: Extract Document details using Document Information Extraction service with ABAP
entry.content: Excellent Blog and it really worked for me. Thanks a lot JoseMunoz.

entry.title: SAP Central Business Configuration Alternate
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can anyone confirm if it is mandatory to configure SAP Cloud (Public) / Grow systems only using the SAP Central Business Configuration?

Is there an alternative way to configure Public Cloud systems without using SAP Central Business Configuration? If yes, please share the details.

Additionally, is there any license requirement or prerequisite for accessing SAP Central Business Configuration?

I have a demo system for SAP Public Cloud. Is SAP Central Business Configuration available for demo systems?

entry.title: Re: SAP FICO Handling of Expenses Before Sales
entry.content:
Hi

You might want to check this functionality and adopt it to your needs:

Manage Condition Contracts - Sales Rebates | SAP Help Portal

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - Utilities add on - Ho...
entry.content:
Hello,

Premises cannot be created in Service Cloud v2, they should be created in your backend and replicated to Service Cloud.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Help needed in HR forms WT1000 (Working hours) cumula...
entry.content: Then in that case Check Processing Class 20  the wage type should have without split and let me know the output

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Dat Nguyen and I am 30 years old.

I identify myself as: People looking to switch their careers mid-life.

I have just finished the learning journey "Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation". In the future, I want to boost my career with Production planning skills.

 

Regards,

Dat Nguyen

entry.title: Re: Why FM HR_ECM_DELETE_INFOTYPE does not work?
entry.content:
Thank you @ulrich_mhrke .

That worked perfectly fine!

Ans: call the function module HR_ECM_FLUSH_INFOTYPE after FM HR_ECM_DELETE_INFOTYPE.

entry.title: Special GL
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I have a requirement where I need to create a Special GL for customer retention so that the retention amount would be on hold in this special GL until the receivable date is due.

 

Can anyone please help me with this as how to move forward with this.

entry.title: Code de parrainage B I T G E T : bet168 – Bonus de 1 000 USDT
entry.content:
Pour 2024, le code de parrainage B I T G E T est « bet168 ». Si vous utilisez le code de parrainage B I T G E T « bet168 » lors de votre inscription, vous recevrez un bonus de 1 000 USDT, une boîte surprise d'une valeur de 500 USDT et 50 % de réduction sur les frais de négociation.

Qu'est-ce qu'un code de parrainage B I T G E T ?

Un code de parrainage B I T G E T comme « bet168 » est un code promotionnel spécial qui offre aux nouveaux utilisateurs divers bonus lorsqu'ils s'inscrivent à un compte B I T G E T. Considérez-le comme un code de coupon pour nouveau membre. Si vous utilisez un code de parrainage lors de votre inscription, vous pouvez bénéficier d'avantages tels que des bonus d'inscription, des remises sur les frais de négociation et des boîtes surprises avec des récompenses surprises.

Quel est le meilleur code de parrainage B I T G E T en 2024 ?

Le code de parrainage B I T G E T le plus recommandé pour 2024 est « bet168 ». En utilisant ce code lors de votre inscription, vous gagnerez un généreux bonus de 100 $. De plus, en partageant votre code de parrainage avec d'autres personnes, vous gagnerez une généreuse commission de 50 %. Cela vous donne la possibilité d'accumuler jusqu'à 1 000 USDT en guise de bonus de bienvenue. C'est un excellent moyen de démarrer votre expérience de trading avec des avantages supplémentaires tout en invitant d'autres personnes à se joindre à vous et à recevoir leurs propres récompenses.

entry.title: create service key for SAP Cloud ALM.
entry.content:
We had Cloud ALM provisioned recently and we need a service key to be generated for the service.

kindly do the needful


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: create service key for SAP Cloud ALM.
entry.content:
Refer to the following documentation to create the SAP Cloud ALM API instance and generate the service key.

0003121402 - How to Enable SAP Cloud ALM API
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/enabling-sap-cloud-alm-api-in-cloud-foundry

entry.title: Re: A new generation of CDS views: CDS view entities
entry.content:
I understand that VIEW ENTITIES are the recommended approach. However, I recently encountered a scenario where VIEW ENTITIES do not function as expected when accessed in the HANA database. While there are no syntax errors, they fail to return any data. To resolve the issue, I had to create a classical CDS view, which works both in ABAP reports and the HANA database.

Could you please provide any insights or suggestions on how to access VIEW ENTITIES directly in the HANA database?

Regards,
Yellappa.

entry.title: Re: In a asset class, is it possible to assign different...
entry.content:
Hi @VENKATARAMAKRISHNA1 

it would be great if you could specify the system and version you are using: ECC or S/4HANA (New Asset Accounting) or S/4HANA with UPA (Intelligent Asset Accounting)

Ideally you should be able to use AS02 if you are using ECC to update the Depreciation key. However, please note that once your depreciation key is changed, the depreciation for open fiscal year will be recalculated.

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: The UploadSet control in SAPUI5 cannot upload files properly
Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi @jonwalnikhilesh 

You should be receiving the badges soon. We are in the process.

entry.title: Re: The UploadSet control in SAPUI5 cannot upload files properly
entry.content: Please refer to this note to solve the issue: 3377504

entry.title: Different E Mail Address for Bill To and Ship To Party
entry.content:
We have a requirement where we want to send a sales order confirmation to a separate e-mail ID and send billing document to a separate ID of the same sales order and same Bill To and Ship To partners. Please let us know how we can achieve this. Output Parameter Determination | SAP Help Portal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Different E Mail Address for Bill To and Ship To Party
entry.content:
Dear customer,

This issue falls into consulting category that is out of the scope of standard Support.

Could you please take a look at the following KBA?

2706322 - What is Support – What is Consulting: Cloud Solutions

Regarding your requirement, please go through the following documentations for more insights.

  1. support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/Library/Setup/1LQ_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf
  2. Output Parameter Determination | SAP Help Portal
